name: Rachel
history: Rachel has recurring relationship problems with her husband Ivan. Work-related stress. Sister Emma often takes a caring role toward Rachel. Father had a successful career and strong work ethic, influencing Rachel's expectations. Recently laid off and currently looking for new employment.
intermediate_belief: I must meet high expectations to be successful.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet these expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoids taking risks in career decisions to prevent failure.
situation: Comparing personal career aspirations to those of the spouse.
auto_thought: I will never find a job that fulfills me like it does for others.
behavior: Avoids pursuing new job opportunities actively.
